"use client";

import { useForm } from "react-hook-form";
import type { Path } from "react-hook-form";
import { zodResolver } from "@hookform/resolvers/zod";
import { useRouter } from "next/navigation";
import { toast } from "sonner";
import { Loader2, {{#each fields}}{{icon}}, {{/each}}Save } from "lucide-react";

// Componentes Reutilizables
import { FormField } from "@/components/form-field";
import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button";

// Tipado y Lógica
import {
  {{modelName}}FormData,
  {{modelNameLower}}Schema
} from "@/features/{{domain}}/schemas/{{modelNameLower}}-schema";
import { {{modelNameLower}}Action } from "@/features/{{domain}}/actions/{{modelNameLower}}";

export function {{modelName}}Form() {
  const router = useRouter();

  const {
    register,
    handleSubmit,
    formState: { errors, isSubmitting },
    setError,
  } = useForm<{{modelName}}FormData>({
    resolver: zodResolver({{modelNameLower}}Schema),
  });

  const onSubmit = async (data: {{modelName}}FormData) => {
    try {
      const result = await {{modelNameLower}}Action(data);

      if (!result.success) {
        if (result.fieldErrors) {
          Object.entries(result.fieldErrors).forEach(([key, value]) => {
            setError(key as Path<{{modelName}}FormData>, { message: value?.[0] });
          });
          toast.error("Revisa los campos marcados");
        } else {
          toast.error(result.error || "Ocurrió un error inesperado");
        }
        return;
      }

      toast.success("¡{{modelName}} gestionado correctamente!");
      {{#if redirectPath}}
      router.push("{{redirectPath}}");
      {{/if}}
    } catch (error) {
      toast.error("Error de conexión con el servidor");
    }
  };

  return (
    <form onSubmit={handleSubmit(onSubmit)} className="space-y-6 w-full max-w-md mx-auto">
      <div className="space-y-2 text-center mb-8">
        <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold tracking-tight text-gray-800">
          Formulario de {{modelName}}
        </h2>
        <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground">
          Completa la información requerida para la plataforma.
        </p>
      </div>

      {{#each fields}}
      <FormField
        label="{{label}}"
        placeholder="{{placeholder}}"
        icon={ {{~icon~}} }
        type="{{type}}"
        register={register("{{name}}")}
        error={errors.{{name}}?.message}
      />
      {{/each}}

      <Button
        disabled={isSubmitting}
        className="w-full h-14 font-bold shadow-lg transition-all active:scale-[0.98]"
      >
        {isSubmitting ? (
          <>
            <Loader2 className="mr-2 h-5 w-5 animate-spin" />
            Procesando...
          </>
        ) : (
          "Guardar información"
        )}
      </Button>
    </form>
  );
}
